summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for Poll feature with Honey Groove Gold (#DAA520) branding. All 10 features tested and verified working: gold progress bars, gold checkmark indicator, blind voting, 📊 emoji in filter/badge/composer, responsive layouts, character counter, dynamic options, and persistence.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ PostCards.js PollCard component (lines 796-899): Gold progress bars using inline styles with #DAA520 and rgba(218,165,32,x) gradients
✅ PostCards.js line 876: Gold circle checkmark indicator with background: '#DAA520' for voted option
✅ PostCards.js line 841-845: Blind voting implemented - shows clickable buttons pre-vote, shows percentages post-vote
✅ PostCards.js PILL_STYLES.POLL (line 110): Uses amber colors bg-amber-100, text-amber-800, border-amber-200
✅ PostCards.js PostTypeBadge (line 155): POLL config uses emoji: '📊' with BarChart3 icon fallback

✅ ComposerBar.js Poll modal (lines 1123-1199): Title shows '📊 Create a Poll', gold-themed inputs with border rgba(218,165,32,0.3), 0/500 counter, dynamic add/remove options, gold 'Post Poll' button with background: '#DAA520'
✅ HivePage.js filter bar (line 887): Uses flex-wrap with max-width 580px for desktop, responsive wrapping on mobile
seed_data_creation: Created test poll: 'What is the best pressing of Rumours? 🎸' with 3 options
context_for_next_testing_agent: Poll feature fully implemented and tested. Test poll 'What is the best pressing of Rumours?' exists in feed with 1 vote cast by katie on 'Original 1977 UK Pressing'. All 6 composer chips visible: Now Spinning, Haul, ISO, Note, Randomizer, Poll. Filter bar has 7 filters including 'Polls 📊'. Mobile (390px) shows icons-only composer chips and 3-row filter layout. Desktop (1920px) shows text labels in composer and 2-row filter layout with max-width 580px.

features_verified.feature: Poll card shows Honey Gold (#DAA520) progress bars for results when user has voted
features_verified.notes: Gold progress bar visible on voted option using inline styles with linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(218,165,32,0.25), rgba(218,165,32,0.15))

features_verified.feature: Poll card shows gold circle checkmark on the voted option (My Vote indicator)
features_verified.notes: Gold circle (background: '#DAA520') with white Check icon visible on 'Original 1977 UK Pressing' after voting

features_verified.feature: Pre-vote: poll shows clickable option buttons WITHOUT percentages (blind voting)
features_verified.notes: Before voting, poll shows 3 clickable option buttons with no percentages visible

features_verified.feature: Post-vote: poll transforms to show gold percentage bars and total count
features_verified.notes: After voting, poll shows 100%, 0%, 0% percentages and '1 person responded'

features_verified.feature: 📊 emoji appears in Poll filter pill, Poll type badge, and Poll composer button
features_verified.notes: 📊 emoji visible in: 1) Feed filter 'Polls 📊', 2) Post badge '📊 Poll', 3) Composer modal title '📊 Create a Poll'

features_verified.feature: Feed filter bar wraps properly: desktop matches feed width, mobile shows clean rows without cutoff
features_verified.notes: Desktop: 580px width (matches feed), 68px height (2 rows). Mobile: 358px width, 102px height (3 rows clean wrap)

features_verified.feature: ComposerBar shows 6 chips (Now Spinning, Haul, ISO, Note, Randomizer, Poll) with proper wrapping on mobile
features_verified.notes: All 6 chips visible. Desktop shows text labels. Mobile (390px) shows icon-only mode with proper single-row layout

features_verified.feature: Poll composer modal: 📊 icon, gold-themed inputs, 0/500 character counter, dynamic options (add/remove), Post Poll button in gold
features_verified.notes: Modal title '📊 Create a Poll' with gold color. Character counter updates (40/500 shown). Add option button works. Post Poll button has gold background #DAA520

features_verified.feature: Creating a new poll via composer: fill question + options, click Post Poll, verify it appears in feed
features_verified.notes: Successfully created poll 'What is the best pressing of Rumours? 🎸' with 3 options. Toast '🍯 poll posted!' shown. Poll appeared in feed immediately

features_verified.feature: Persistence: page refresh shows results view (not voting buttons) for users who already voted
features_verified.notes: After page refresh, poll still shows results view with percentages, gold checkmark, and '1 person responded' - not voting buttons
